title: Will AI-linked job losses on Friday, Mar 20 be above 87000?
rules: If the "Total AI-linked job losses" figure displayed on jobloss.ai on Mar 20, 2026 at 5pm ET is above 87,000, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will AI-linked job losses on Friday, Mar 20 be above 84000?
rules: If the "Total AI-linked job losses" figure displayed on jobloss.ai on Mar 20, 2026 at 5pm ET is above 84,000, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will AI-linked job losses on Friday, Mar 20 be above 81000?
rules: If the "Total AI-linked job losses" figure displayed on jobloss.ai on Mar 20, 2026 at 5pm ET is above 81,000, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will legislation providing full-year FY2026 discretionary appropriations for the Department of Homeland Security (including via continuing resolution) become law before Mar 20, 2026?
rules: If legislation providing full-year FY2026 discretionary appropriations for the Department of Homeland Security (including via continuing resolution) has become law before Mar 20, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will legislation that, upon becoming law, results in the Department of Homeland Security being funded at 12:01 AM ET on the later of (i) February 14, 2026 and (ii) the calendar day after enactment become law before Mar 20, 2026?
rules: If legislation that, upon becoming law, results in the Department of Homeland Security being funded at 12:01 AM ET on the later of (i) February 14, 2026 and (ii) the calendar day after enactment has become law before Mar 20, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will Federal Funds Rate Decision be 25bp cut AND Dissents be >0 for Mar 2026?
rules: If ALL of the following occur for Mar 2026: Federal Funds Rate Decision: 25bp cut, Dissents: >0, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the maximum temperature be  <93° on Mar 17, 2026?
rules: If the maximum temperature recorded at Phoenix for Mar 17, 2026, is less than 93° fahrenheit according to the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the maximum temperature be  95-96° on Mar 17, 2026?
rules: If the maximum temperature recorded at Phoenix for Mar 17, 2026, is between 95-96° fahrenheit according to the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the maximum temperature be  88-89° on Mar 17, 2026?
rules: If the maximum temperature recorded at Las Vegas for Mar 17, 2026, is between 88-89° fahrenheit according to the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Men's March Madness Round of 64 Qualifiers
rules: If UMBC qualifies for the 2026 Men's March Madness Round of 64, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Men's March Madness Round of 64 Qualifiers
rules: If Texas qualifies for the 2026 Men's March Madness Round of 64, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Men's March Madness Round of 64 Qualifiers
rules: If SMU qualifies for the 2026 Men's March Madness Round of 64, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Top Song on Weekly Top Songs USA on Mar 19, 2026?
subtitle: :: PinkPantheress
rules: If Stateside + Zara Larsson is #1 on the Weekly Top Songs USA chart on the chart dated Mar 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Top Song on Weekly Top Songs USA on Mar 19, 2026?
subtitle: :: Harry Styles
rules: If American Girls is #1 on the Weekly Top Songs USA chart on the chart dated Mar 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will MONICA have At least 80000 album sales on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for March 19th 2026?
rules: If MONICA by Jack Harlow's sales, on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for March 19th 2026, are At least 80000, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the S&P 500 be above 6999.9999 on Mar 20, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
subtitle: 7,000.0099 or above
rules: If the end-of-day S&P 500 index value on March 20, 2026 is above 6999.9999, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the S&P 500 be between 6875 and 6899.9999 on Mar 20, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
subtitle: 6,875 to 6,899.9999
rules: If the end-of-day S&P 500 index value on March 20, 2026 is between 6875-6899.9999, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the S&P 500 be between 6850 and 6874.9999 on Mar 20, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
subtitle: 6,850 to 6,874.9999
rules: If the end-of-day S&P 500 index value on March 20, 2026 is between 6850-6874.9999, then the market resolves to Yes.
